info.name: TurfIn Backend API
info.description: API collection for the TurfIn Backend Monolith. Built with NestJS and Drizzle ORM.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Public authentication flows plus authenticated token revocation. Use these requests to create accounts, sign in, rotate JWTs, and sign out.

request.description: Register a new end_user account. Creates auth identity + user profile in a single step.
Register a new vendor_owner account. Creates auth identity + vendor profile + empty KYC record in a single atomic transaction. Includes optional financial terms (payoutCycle, commissionPct).
Login with email + password.
Rotate access + refresh tokens.
Revoke refresh token (logout).

item.name: Audit
item.description: System-wide audit logging endpoints for administrators.

query.description: Filter by category: auth, kyc, booking, payment, slot, admin, vendor, turf, user
Filter by specific audit action: AUTH_LOGIN, AUTH_SIGNUP, TURF_CREATE, USER_ADDRESS_ADD, etc.

request.description: List all system audit logs with pagination and optional filters. Requires super_admin role.

query.description: Filter by category for export: auth, kyc, booking, payment, slot, admin, vendor, turf, user

request.description: Export all filtered audit logs to a CSV file. Uses streaming to handle large datasets.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Super admin delegated operations. These endpoints act on explicit vendor or turf identifiers and should never rely on the currently signed-in vendor context.

item.name: Users
item.description: User profile management and account statuses.

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, banned, under_review

request.description: List end-user profiles with pagination metadata. Requires a super_admin bearer token.
Fetch a specific user profile by its ID. Moved from /users/:id to /admin/users/:userId.
Ban a user and cancel all active bookings.
Unban a user account.

item.name: Vendors
item.description: Vendor profile management, onboarding, and lifecycle.

query.description: Filter by status: active, pending, suspended, banned

request.description: List vendor profiles with pagination metadata. Includes KYC details. Requires a super_admin bearer token.
Fetch a specific vendor profile by its ID. Requires a super_admin bearer token.

body.raw:
{
    "businessName": "Premier Sports Admin Edit",
    "phone": "+919999999999", // optional
    "whatsapp": "+919999999999", // optional
    "gstNumber": "22DDDDD0000D1Z8", // optional
    "payoutCycle": "monthly" // optional: daily | weekly | monthly
}

request.description: Delegated update of a specific vendor profile by an administrator. Acts on an explicit vendorId.
Ban a vendor and disable their login identity.
Unban a vendor and restore their identity to active status.
Soft-delete a vendor profile. This sets the deletedAt timestamp and marked the vendor as inactive.

body.raw:
{
    "email": "new_vendor@example.com",
    "password": "secure_pass_123",
    "firstName": "Jane", // optional identity field
    "lastName": "Vendor", // optional identity field
    "displayName": "JaneV", // optional identity field
    "vendorProfile": {
        "businessName": "Premier Sports Hub",
        "businessType": "company",
        "ownerFullName": "Jane Admin-Vendor",
        "phone": "+919876543211",
        "whatsapp": "+919876543211", // optional
        "gstNumber": "22BBBBB0000B1Z6", // optional
        "businessRegistrationNumber": "DEF789012", // optional
        "address": {
            "type": "work",
            "pinCode": "682002",
            "houseNumber": "Plot 456",
            "floor": "Level 2",
            "towerBlock": "Sports Plaza",
            "landmark": "Opposite Stadium",
            "city": "Kochi",
            "state": "Kerala",
            "country": "India",
            "contactName": "Jane Vendor",
            "contactPhone": "+919876543211",
            "latitude": 9.9312,
            "longitude": 76.2673,
            "googleMapsLink": "https://maps.google.com/?q=9.9312,76.2673"
        },
        "bankingDetails": {
            "bankName": "SBI",
            "accountHolderName": "Premier Sports",
            "accountNumber": "0987654321",
            "ifsc": "SBIN0004567"
        },
        "commissionPct": "12.5", // optional: stored as string
        "payoutCycle": "monthly" // optional: daily | weekly | monthly
    }
}

request.description: Create a vendor_owner identity, vendor profile, and empty KYC record in one transaction. Use this when ops/admin creates the vendor directly.
Create a turf on behalf of a vendor using an explicit vendorId. This also initializes the turf document record with not_started status.

item.name: Turfs
item.description: Turf field management and status overrides.

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, pending, maintenance, suspended, banned

request.description: List all turf profiles across all vendors with pagination metadata. Includes vendor contact details and field photos. Requires a super_admin bearer token.
Fetch any turf by id through the admin delegated route. Includes vendor contact details and field photos. This bypasses vendor self-scope and is intended for backoffice tooling.
Ban a turf field from administrative side.
Unban a turf field.
Update turf status to inactive, maintenance, or suspended.
Submit or partially update vendor KYC documents through the admin delegated route.
Review a vendor's KYC submission. Setting status to verified activates the vendor; rejected or in_review keeps the vendor pending.
Submit or merge turf verification documents through the admin delegated route. Completeness can automatically move the document status to pending.
Read turf document status and stored document URLs through the admin delegated route.
Review turf verification documents. Setting status to verified activates the turf; rejected or in_review keeps the turf pending.
Directly update a sub-admin password using admin override permissions. Only works if target user is a sub-admin.

item.name: Users
item.description: Authenticated end-user profile operations. These routes operate on the signed-in identity, except the explicit admin-only lookup by user id.

request.description: Retrieve current logged-in user profile.
Update specific fields of the user profile.
Soft-delete current user's account.
Add a new address to the user's profile.
Update specific fields of an existing address.
Set the specified address as the primary one (index 0 swap).
Delete a specific address from the user's profile.
Search for available turfs. Returns vendor contact details and field photos.
Fetch expanded details of a specific turf field. Includes vendor business name, phone, WhatsApp and field photos.

item.name: Vendors
item.description: Vendor-owner self-service profile endpoints. These infer the vendor from the authenticated identity instead of requiring a vendorId path param.

request.description: Retrieve the profile of the vendor associated with the current identity.

body.raw:
{
    "businessName": "Acme Sports Refined",
    "ownerFullName": "John Updated", // optional
    "email": "updated-vendor@example.com", // optional
    "phone": "+919876543212", // optional
    "whatsapp": "+919876543212", // optional
    "gstNumber": "22CCCCC0000C1Z7", // optional
    "businessRegistrationNumber": "GHI135790", // optional
    "payoutCycle": "weekly" // optional: daily | weekly | monthly
}

request.description: Partially update vendor fields like businessName, address, or bankingDetails.

item.name: KYC
item.description: Vendor KYC submission and status retrieval.

request.description: Submit or merge KYC document URLs. Status moves to pending if essential docs are present.
Retrieve the current KYC verification status and stored document metadata.

item.name: Vendor Turfs
item.description: Turf management for vendors. Covers creation, retrieval, and document verification flows.

request.description: Create a new turf field. Automatically initializes a corresponding turf document record with not_started status.
List all turfs owned by the authenticated vendor. Includes contact details and field photos.
Fetch details of a specific turf field. Includes vendor contact details and field photos.
Partially update turf fields like name, price, or operating hours.
Soft-delete a turf field. This prevents new bookings.
Submit or merge verification documents for a specific turf field.
Get current status and metadata of turf documents.

item.name: Storage
item.description: Secure document storage operations. Generates short-lived signed URLs for uploads and views.

request.description: Generate a short-lived signed URL for uploading a file to a specific path.
Generate a short-lived signed URL for viewing a private file.

item.name: Sub-Admin Management
item.description: RBAC management endpoints for creating sub-admins, managing custom roles, and assigning granular resource:action permissions.

request.description: List all identities with the 'sub_admin' role and their assigned custom roles.
Permanently decommission a sub-admin. Revokes roles and deletes from Auth.
List all custom (non-system) roles and their granular permissions.
Fetch the catalogue of all granular resource:action permissions defined in the system.
Get roles assigned to a specific sub-admin.
Permanently delete a custom role.

item.name: Health
item.description: Public operational health endpoints for backend and database availability checks.

request.description: Basic server health check.
Check database connectivity health.
